title: Xtra Chewy Korean Soybean Sprouts Bowl
description: A peppery and chewy vegetarian dish featuring soybean sprouts, perfect for a brunch mood, inspired by Croatian and Korean cuisine. This recipe is vegetarian friendly and features pressure cooked soybean sprouts.
instructions: Rinse the soybean sprouts and remove any debris or broken sprouts.
In a large pot, combine the soybean sprouts and water, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes, then drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat, then add the chopped onion and cook until softened.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the cooked soybean sprouts, soy sauce, sesame oil, salt, and black pepper to the skillet, and stir to combine.
Transfer the soybean sprout mixture to a serving bowl and serve hot.
Pressure cook the soybean sprouts for 10 minutes, if desired, for a softer texture.
Garnish with chopped green onions and toasted sesame seeds, if desired.
